data.body: Research spike completed: Jira Cloud 'Relates' link type confirmed (id 10003, symmetric). bridge-outbound.py has no LINK event handling (gap). bridge-inbound.py already reads Jira links. Local ticket-link.sh fully supports relates_to. Related epics: fed2-b1ce (shared artifact impact analysis), b555-bac6 (sprint drift follow-on).
